# sim.admixture_demography_impure_refs { #tspaint.sim.admixture_demography_impure_refs }

```python
tspaint.sim.admixture_demography_impure_refs(
    Ne=1000,
    T_admix=30.0,
    census_offset=1.0,
    T_split=5000.0,
    f_A=0.5,
    ref_impurity=0.1,
)
```

Admixture demography whose **reference panels are themselves slightly admixed**.

Like :func:`admixture_demography` but adds two impure reference populations:
``REF_A_IMPURE`` draws a fraction ``1 - ref_impurity`` from source A and
``ref_impurity`` from B (and symmetrically ``REF_B_IMPURE``), so a panel nominally
labelled "A" carries a known minority of genuine B tracts. All three derived
populations (the queries ``ADMIX`` and the two reference panels) form at ``T_admix``;
the post-pulse census at ``T_admix + census_offset`` still labels every lineage's
true source per segment, so :func:`local_ancestry_truth` recovers the references'
own foreign tracts as ground truth.

## Parameters {.doc-section .doc-section-parameters}

<code>[**Ne**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[float](`float`)]{.parameter-annotation} [ = ]{.parameter-default-sep} [1000]{.parameter-default}</code>

:   Diploid effective size for every population.

<code>[**T_admix**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[float](`float`)]{.parameter-annotation} [ = ]{.parameter-default-sep} [30.0]{.parameter-default}</code>

:   Time (generations ago) of the admixture pulse forming all derived populations.

<code>[**census_offset**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[float](`float`)]{.parameter-annotation} [ = ]{.parameter-default-sep} [1.0]{.parameter-default}</code>

:   Offset added to ``T_admix`` to place the census (kept strictly between admixture and split).

<code>[**T_split**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[float](`float`)]{.parameter-annotation} [ = ]{.parameter-default-sep} [5000.0]{.parameter-default}</code>

:   Time at which A and B coalesce into ANCESTRAL.

<code>[**f_A**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[float](`float`)]{.parameter-annotation} [ = ]{.parameter-default-sep} [0.5]{.parameter-default}</code>

:   Fraction of the admixed *query* population contributed by source A.

<code>[**ref_impurity**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[float](`float`)]{.parameter-annotation} [ = ]{.parameter-default-sep} [0.1]{.parameter-default}</code>

:   Minority (foreign-source) fraction of each impure reference panel, in ``[0, 0.5)``. ``0`` reproduces pure references.

## Returns {.doc-section .doc-section-returns}

<code>[]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[msprime](`msprime`).[Demography](`msprime.Demography`)]{.parameter-annotation}</code>

:   Demography with populations A, B, ADMIX, REF_A_IMPURE, REF_B_IMPURE and ANCESTRAL plus the admixture, census and split events.

## Raises {.doc-section .doc-section-raises}

<code>[:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[ValueError](`ValueError`)]{.parameter-annotation}</code>

:   If ``T_admix < T_admix + census_offset < T_split`` is violated or ``ref_impurity`` is outside ``[0, 0.5)``.
